reviews.review_description: Its a fun game but for the levels it has the pice isn't justified i beat the game in 1 sitting and now have been waiting on an update for a while. So please put an update with more levels id like to play it again cause the old ones are too easy once u beat them.
Fails during launch, on my Go.
Beautiful graphics and nice mechanics, really entertaining.
Good for young people but I was bored with it

Amazing tower defense game.  30 levels. Felt short I got to last level right at 2 hours.  But haven't beat that level yet. Really challenging and keeps you on you're toes.  The game was worth it for that level alone.  Graphics and game play are great.  I can see repaying it over and over whenever I'm in the mood on level 30. I love a challenge. Anyone interested in tower defence and managing resources and even units pick it up. We'll done.
